display.purpose: Module titles in navy header cards only. White text on dark background.

headline.purpose: Section card headings. Ink Navy on white.

title.purpose: Card headers, sidebar module names, quiz question text.

body.purpose: All prose and lesson explanations. Body Text (#3A5068) on white.

label.purpose: Status badges, section tags, track labels. Uppercase only at this size.

mono.purpose: Code blocks, inline code, IntelliSense, history modal labels.

shadows.name: modal-overlay
shadows.purpose: Modals, IntelliSense dropdown, history modal. The only permitted shadow in the system.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: All UI state transitions — sidebar slide, collapse panels, button hover.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Core action — start module, submit quiz, check answer.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2A6EBB; color: #fff; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1e5a9e; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4A9FD4; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 8px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supplementary actions — view solution, reset, cancel.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #EBF4FB; color: #2A6EBB; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #d9ecf7; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4A9FD4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary actions — inline text-style links that behave as buttons.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #3A5068; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid #D0DEF0; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F4F7FB; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4A9FD4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Standard white content card on page tint.
components.html:
Section Title
Card content goes here with body text styling.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E2ECF5; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { background: #F8FAFC; border-bottom: 1px solid #E8F0F8; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #0B1829; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; font-size: 14px; color: #3A5068; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Dark navy code display — a first-class visual element in this teaching context.
components.html: // EventType: OnEligible var field = Event.Employee.CustomFields["Name"];
components.css: .ds-code-block { background: #0B1829; color: #B8D4EC; font-family: 'Roboto Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.75; padding: 16px 20px; border-radius: 12px; white-space: pre; overflow-x: auto; position: relative; } .ds-code-comment { color: #4A6880; font-style: italic; } .ds-code-keyword { color: #7EB3F7; } .ds-code-string { color: #9ECBFF; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item — Active
components.description: Currently selected page or lesson in the sidebar.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #2A6EBB; color: #fff; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-icon { font-size: 14px; width: 16px; text-align: center; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item — Default
components.description: Inactive sidebar link on navy background.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-nav-item--default { background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); } .ds-nav-item--default:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: rgba(255,255,255,1); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Module completion state chip — Available, Done, Locked.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-badge--available { background: #EBF4FB; color: #2A6EBB; border-color: rgba(42,110,187,0.2); } .ds-badge--done { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; border-color: #dcfce7; } .ds-badge--locked { background: #f1f5f9; color: #94a3b8; border-color: #e2e8f0; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Text input — used in login modal.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; border: 1.5px solid #D0DEF0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #0B1829; background: #fff; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #4A9FD4; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(74,159,212,0.12); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7A9BB8; }

components.name: Warn Callout
components.description: Lesson warning box — amber gradient with floated icon.
components.html: Note: Always check for null before using a nullable DateTime.
components.css: .ds-callout { padding: 14px 16px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.6; overflow: hidden; } .ds-callout-icon { float: left; margin: 2px 10px 4px 0; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-callout--warn { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fffbeb 0%, #fef3c7 100%); border-left: 3px solid #f59e0b; color: #7A5200; } .ds-callout p { margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
This is a professional learning tool built for consultants who need to move fast and leave with real skills. The visual system is guided, encouraging, and milestone-focused — warm enough to feel human, precise enough to feel like a serious product. Every screen should communicate: you are making progress, this is well-organized, and the next step is clear.

The palette pairs a cool navy sidebar (the structure that holds everything) with a bright, confident blue accent (the signal that marks progress and action) against a whisper-tinted neutral background. White content cards float on that background, separating concern without using shadows. Color is the primary depth signal; shadows are reserved for modals and overlays.

Typography is single-family (Roboto), differentiated by weight and size. Roboto Mono carries all code — it is treated as a first-class visual element, not an afterthought. Code blocks get full dark backgrounds and comfortable line-height because reading code in this course is a primary task.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal layering without shadows — depth through background color, not elevation
Track colors as a navigation signal — four module tracks each have a named accent
Code as a first-class surface — dark code blocks with generous spacing and monospace hierarchy
Progress as ambient information — completion rings, progress bars, and scores are always visible but never demanding
Sidebar as the backbone — the deep navy sidebar is persistent, confident, and never cluttered

rules.name: The One Blue Rule
rules.body: The primary blue (#2A6EBB) is the only color that marks an actionable or selected state. Sky Accent (#4A9FD4) is informational and focus-ring only. Never use track colors for interactive states outside their own track header.

rules.name: The Track Fence Rule
rules.body: Track colors (#007AFF, #F59E0B, #10B981, #EF4444) are used exclusively for module-track identification surfaces. They must not appear on buttons, navigation pills, or progress indicators that apply globally across all tracks.

rules.name: The Border Ladder Rule
rules.body: #E2ECF5 for card/container edges, #E8F0F8 for dividers inside cards, #D0DEF0 for form input strokes. Do not introduce a fourth border color.

rules.name: The Code-First Rule
rules.body: Code blocks receive full dark-background treatment at all sizes — never inline styled as prose. Roboto Mono must always be used for code; system monospace is an unacceptable fallback in the rendered UI.

rules.name: The Uppercase Ceiling
rules.body: Uppercase text is permitted only for Label-role elements (badges, breakdown titles, track labels). Never use uppercase for headings, body copy, or button labels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The single permitted shadow (0 8px 32px rgba(11,24,41,0.18)) is only for elements that genuinely float above the content layer (dropdowns, modals, tooltips). Using shadows on cards or section dividers is prohibited.

dos: Do use #2A6EBB (Selerix Blue) as the sole signal for actionable and selected states globally.
Do use #3A5068 (Body Text) for all prose on white backgrounds. Reserve #0B1829 for structural elements.
Do keep all code in Roboto Mono with full dark-background treatment — never styled as prose.
Do use the Page Tint (#F4F7FB) as the canvas and white as the content surface. Flat layering only.
Do use Surface Alt (#F8FAFC) for section headers and table rows inside cards — not as a card background.
Do follow the Border Ladder: #E2ECF5 for card edges, #E8F0F8 for intra-card dividers, #D0DEF0 for input strokes.
Do keep track colors confined to module-track identification surfaces only.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — every transition must have a zero-duration fallback.
Do use line-clamp-2 on sidebar module titles — never hard character truncation.
donts: Don't use box-shadow on cards, section dividers, or content surfaces. Shadows are reserved for floating UI only.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Single solid colors only.
Don't apply border-left greater than 1px as a decorative stripe on cards or list items.
Don't design anything that resembles a corporate training portal (Cornerstone, SAP SuccessFactors).
Don't design anything that resembles a heavy academic LMS (Canvas, Blackboard).
Don't use uppercase text outside Label-role elements.
Don't use border-radius above 16px on cards or containers.
Don't use track colors on interactive elements outside their own module track header context.
Don't add decorative SVG patterns, gradients, or illustration to any surface other than the module header card.
Don't use #7A9BB8 (Muted Slate) for body prose — use #3A5068 (Body Text) instead.
